brief_notes: All numerical claims verified against the source extraction are correct, including AUC values, MAE scores, correlation coefficients, dataset sizes, p-values, computational times, and prior work statistics. The paper is well-structured with clear tables and good section organization. Minor completeness gaps: (1) does not mention BELA underperforms the embryologist BS model on WCM-Embryoscope+ even with maternal age, (2) omits some discussion details about IVF Florida scoring at 115 and 144 hpi vs WCM earlier timepoints, (3) does not mention Down syndrome/Turner's syndrome as examples of aneuploid outcomes. Citations are reasonable but use placeholder BibTeX keys that may not resolve; the paper would benefit from more precise citation formatting. Writing quality is solid academic prose throughout. Presentation is strong with multiple well-formatted tables summarizing results, methods parameters, and computational resources.
